title: Rebuild Metrics Analyst Assessment UX for Snowflake and Salesforce
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a rebuilt metrics analyst assessment experience that works consistently for both Snowflake semantic views and Salesforce dashboards, so that I have a unified workflow regardless of data source.
description:
Export the Lovable prototype design and translate it into the production DataTools Pro application to fully replace the existing metrics glossary experience.

### Phased Approach
1. **Phase 1 — Snowflake Semantic Views:** Rebuild the metrics analyst assessment and reconciliation UX using the Lovable prototype as the design source. This becomes the new standard for Snowflake-sourced metrics.
2. **Phase 2 — Salesforce:** Apply the same rebuilt UX and functions to Salesforce dashboards/reports once new web services are ready.

### Design Reference
Lovable prototype: serves as the target UX for the rebuilt experience.
acceptance_criteria: Lovable prototype design is translated into production Bootstrap HTML
Rebuilt UX fully replaces the existing metrics glossary experience for Snowflake
Assessment and reconciliation workflow is consistent between Snowflake and Salesforce sources
New web services integration is in place before Salesforce phase begins
ux_changes: Complete rebuild of the metrics analyst assessment interface based on Lovable prototype. New unified experience for both Snowflake semantic views and Salesforce dashboards.
middleware_changes: Reconciliation functions updated to work consistently across Snowflake and Salesforce data sources.
implementation_notes: Lovable prototype uses Vue/inline styles, not Bootstrap HTML — translation to Bootstrap is required. Salesforce phase depends on new web services being completed.
